# Skills & Tools

## Programming & Data Engineering
- **Python** (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
- **R** (Tidyverse, ggplot2)
- **SQL** (Snowflake, PostgreSQL)
- **C++**
- ETL Pipelines & Data Integration
- API Development & Integration

## Machine Learning & AI
- Regression, Classification, Clustering
- Decision Trees, Random Forest, XGBoost
- Neural Networks & Deep Learning (CNNs, PyTorch)
- Hyperparameter Tuning
- Natural Language Processing (NLP)
- Embeddings & LLM Applications
- Prompt Engineering & LLM Fine-Tuning

## Analytics & Data Visualization
- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Time Series & Network Analysis
- Data Visualization (Matplotlib, ggplot2, Tableau)
- Dashboarding & Insight Communication

## Tools & Technologies
- Git & GitHub
- VS Code, Cursor
- Docker
- Snowflake
- PostgreSQL
- Excel & PowerPoint

## Operating Systems
- macOS
- Linux

## Languages
- English (Fluent)
- Spanish (Native)
- Mandarin Chinese (Advanced)
